Dominant Weekly Call OI (14.8k) creates an immediate short-term ceiling just above the spot price, capping intraday upside.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed by positive GEX; bearish skew signals persistent hedging
outlook.summary: Market pinned at 25000 with positive GEX (1.35B) stabilizing prices across all expiries. Bearish smirk skews indicate heavy protective put buying despite flat price action. RESONANCE resistance at 25200 and support at 24800 define the dealer-controlled range. Gamma flip at 24867 is the critical directional trigger — loss of this level amplifies downside in a falling GEX regime.

levels.motivazione: Significant Call OI across ALL 3 expiries: 0DTE (95, Vol 1944), WEEKLY (85), MONTHLY (150). Triple-timeframe resistance with intense dealer hedging overhead. Highest 0DTE volume after 25000 confirms active defense.

Significant Call OI in ALL 3 expiries: 0DTE (90), WEEKLY (345, 2nd highest), MONTHLY (80). Major dealer support backed by positive GEX. Confluence with nearby gamma flip at 24867 reinforces structural importance.

0DTE gamma flip where cumulative GEX changes sign. Critical pivot separating bullish gamma regime (above) from bearish amplification (below). Clustered with 24800 RESONANCE support — loss of both triggers acceleration lower.
Confluence of 0DTE (CALL OI 170, PUT OI 51, massive Vol 2626) and WEEKLY (CALL OI 134). ATM pinning level with highest intraday volume. Dealer delta-neutral target zone.
Confluence of 0DTE PUT OI (68) and MONTHLY PUT OI (533, top put). Also max pain for both 0DTE and MONTHLY expiries. Deep structural floor validated by bearish smirk skew across all timeframes.
Highest 0DTE Call OI (238) with active volume (793). Primary upside cap for today's session. Positive GEX reinforces dealer selling pressure at this strike.
Massive MONTHLY Call OI (4028) — the single largest OI across all datasets. Creates deep dealer hedging support. Reinforced by MONTHLY PUT OI (56). Magnetic attraction for monthly expiry.
Active 0DTE Call OI (102) with heavy volume (1081). Secondary resistance between 25200 and 25500 walls creating intraday friction zone. Dealer hedging caps rallies here.
WEEKLY highest Call OI (548) and WEEKLY max pain. Strong magnetic pull for weekly expiry. Aligned with bearish skew sentiment suggesting downside drift toward this level.
